parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: 19-digit transaction ID from the Request API (process as 64-bit long).

request.description: JSON body. The Confirm request fields (amount, currency) are on the JS-rendered Confirm sub-page and are not in this source.

responses.description: HTTP 200 with the standard response envelope {returnCode, returnMessage, info}. returnCode 0000 = success; info present only on success.

missing: Confirm request body fields (amount, currency) not in this source (JS-rendered sub-page).
Confirm response info fields not enumerated in this source.
